title: JSON Schema for Atmos CLI configuration (atmos.yaml). Version 1.0. https://atmos.tools

base_path.description: Root path for resolving relative project paths.

format.description: Output format: table, json, or csv.

ttl.description: Default cache duration for JIT-vendored sources (e.g. 7d, 24h).

conditions.description: Regex patterns matched against subprocess output to trigger retry.

step_condition.description: Declarative condition for workflow/custom-command step execution.

anyOf.description: CEL expression or built-in predicate keyword.

task_step.description: Workflow or custom-command step (string shell command or structured step).

exit_codes.description: Map terraform exit codes to success (true) or failure (false).

prefix_separator.description: Separator for backend key prefixes: '-' or '/'.

ttl.description: Default cache duration for remote (git) stack import source repos.

diagnostics.title: diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Machine-readable JSONL diagnostic event stream settings.

file.description: Path to the local JSONL diagnostics file.

tools.description: Tool name to version constraint map.

oneOf.description: CLI command aliases mapping alias to target command.
Schema registry paths and custom validation schemas.

key_delimiter.description: Delimiter for nested key expansion in stack YAML (e.g. '.').

sections.description: Top-level component sections compared for affected detection.

kind.description: Cloud backend selector (e.g. aws/ssm); takes precedence over type.

secret.description: Mark store as a secret backend.

use.description: Exact Atmos version to re-exec with.

oneOf.description: Modular root configuration imports (atmos.d YAML files).

container.title: container
container.description: Global container runtime defaults (the top-level `container:` namespace).

provider.description: Container runtime provider: docker, podman, or empty for auto-detect.

auto_start.description: Auto-init/start the Podman machine when no running runtime is found.

host.description: Grant containers access to the host container runtime (Docker-out-of-Docker).

default.description: Profile loaded when --profile and ATMOS_PROFILE are unset.

allow_unsafe_fork_execution.description: Opt out of fork-checkout safety gate for pull_request_target/workflow_run.
